title: Chewy Chocolate Chip Cookies
ingredients: ['2 1/4 c. flour', '1 tsp. baking soda', '1 c. butter softened', '3/4 c. white sugar', '3/4 c. brown sugar', '2 eggs', '2 c. chocolate chips']
directions: ['Cream the butter and sugars together.', 'Beat in the eggs one at a time.', 'Mix in the flour and baking soda.', 'Stir in the chocolate chips.', 'Bake at 375 degrees for 9 to 11 minutes for chewy cookies.']

title: Fluffy Buttermilk Pancakes
ingredients: ['2 c. flour', '2 tbsp. sugar', '2 tsp. baking powder', '1 tsp. baking soda', '2 c. buttermilk', '2 eggs', '1/4 c. melted butter']
directions: ['Whisk together the dry ingredients.', 'In another bowl whisk the buttermilk eggs and melted butter.', 'Combine gently leaving some lumps.', 'Cook on a hot greased griddle until bubbles form then flip.']

title: Classic Tomato Basil Soup
ingredients: ['2 tbsp. olive oil', '1 onion chopped', '2 cloves garlic minced', '28 oz. canned tomatoes', '2 c. vegetable broth', '1/2 c. fresh basil', 'salt and pepper']
directions: ['Saute the onion and garlic in olive oil.', 'Add the tomatoes and broth.', 'Simmer for 20 minutes.', 'Blend until smooth.', 'Stir in the basil and season with salt and pepper.']

title: Garlic Butter Chicken and Rice
ingredients: ['2 chicken breasts', '1 c. white rice', '2 c. chicken broth', '3 tbsp. butter', '4 cloves garlic minced', 'salt and pepper', 'chopped parsley']
directions: ['Season and sear the chicken in butter then remove.', 'Cook the garlic and rice in the same pan.', 'Add the broth and bring to a simmer.', 'Return the chicken cover and cook until the rice is tender.', 'Garnish with parsley.']

title: Simple Banana Bread
ingredients: ['3 ripe bananas', '1/3 c. melted butter', '3/4 c. sugar', '1 egg', '1 tsp. vanilla', '1 tsp. baking soda', '1 1/2 c. flour']
directions: ['Mash the bananas in a bowl.', 'Mix in the butter sugar egg and vanilla.', 'Stir in the baking soda and flour.', 'Pour into a greased loaf pan.', 'Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes.']

title: Creamy Stovetop Mac and Cheese
ingredients: ['8 oz. macaroni', '2 tbsp. butter', '2 tbsp. flour', '2 c. milk', '2 c. shredded cheddar cheese', 'salt and pepper']
directions: ['Cook the macaroni and drain.', 'Make a roux with the butter and flour.', 'Whisk in the milk until thickened.', 'Stir in the cheddar until melted.', 'Fold in the macaroni and season.']

title: Fresh Guacamole
ingredients: ['3 ripe avocados', '1 lime juiced', '1/2 onion finely diced', '1 tomato diced', '2 tbsp. chopped cilantro', 'salt to taste']
directions: ['Mash the avocados to your preferred texture.', 'Stir in the lime juice.', 'Fold in the onion tomato and cilantro.', 'Season with salt and serve immediately.']

title: Overnight Oats
ingredients: ['1/2 c. rolled oats', '1/2 c. milk', '1/4 c. yogurt', '1 tbsp. chia seeds', '1 tsp. honey', 'fresh berries']
directions: ['Combine the oats milk yogurt chia seeds and honey in a jar.', 'Stir well and cover.', 'Refrigerate overnight.', 'Top with fresh berries before serving.']
